examples: There was not a hint of badness in him.
Layin' tha' badness on a robin—not but what he's impidint enow for anythin'.
I am unable to complete my work because of his badness.
But while the bigness of information volume poses tremendous management challenges, the badness of much of that data makes it even worse.
Like a car wreck from which you have trouble looking away, the depth of badness Wells evokes makes me wonder what the experience would be like.
